name: DoIP_SetPowerModeInformation
title: DoIP_SetPowerModeInformation
description: Sets the value returned automatically for a Power Mode Information Request.

parameters.name: powerMode
parameters.description: -1: do not send a response for the request0: not ready1: ready2: not supported (default)Others: reserved

example.code:
// The ECU simulation will return “ready” if the power mode is requested
DoIP_SetPowerModeInformation( 1);
